summary: Iteration 30: Route Planner Feature Validation Complete - All 35 backend tests passed (100%), Frontend UI fully working with all 3 tabs (Route, Interdiction, Chase). Star map renders correctly with all systems.

issues: React hydration warnings in console about span elements inside select/option/optgroup - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/routes/locations returns locations (80+ items), systems (stanton, pyro, nyx), qd_speeds
Backend: GET /api/routes/calculate returns route with distance_mkm, travel_time, waypoints, fuel_remaining
Backend: Cross-system route (lorville to pyro-bloom-settlement) includes jump waypoints
Backend: QD speed correctly matches size (S1=165k, S2=190k, S3=240k km/s)
Backend: POST /api/routes/interdiction returns snare_position, coverage_pct, route_details
Backend: Interdiction with single origin gives 100% coverage
Backend: POST /api/routes/chase/advanced returns escape_destinations, intercept_pct, threat_level, tactical_notes
Backend: Chase analysis faster QD gives better intercept percentage
Backend: POST /api/routes/chase (simple) returns can_catch, speeds, verdict
Backend: Error handling - invalid locations return 400
Frontend: Route tab - select origin/destination, calculate route displays summary with Mkm, time, waypoints
Frontend: Route tab - QD Size buttons (S1, S2, S3) work correctly
Frontend: Route tab - SWAP button swaps origin/destination
Frontend: Route tab - fuel remaining percentage bar displayed
Frontend: Interdiction tab - select destination, add origins via presets (+Cities, +Stations, +R&R Stops)
Frontend: Interdiction tab - Your QD and Target QD selectors work
Frontend: Interdiction tab - Snare range slider adjustable
Frontend: Interdiction tab - Analyze Interdiction shows coverage %, route breakdown, arrival timeline
Frontend: Chase tab - select Your Position and Target Spotted At locations
Frontend: Chase tab - Prep Time slider works
Frontend: Chase tab - Analyze Pursuit shows threat level, intercept %, escape routes list
Frontend: Tab switching between Route, Interdiction, Chase works correctly
Frontend: Star map canvas renders with all 3 systems (Stanton, Pyro, Nyx)
Frontend: Star map shows route lines with animations
Frontend: Star map legend shows all location types (Star, Planet, Moon, Station, Gateway, City, Rest Stop, Outpost)
Frontend: Map reset button present
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in console for span elements inside select/option/optgroup - cosmetic issue that doesn't affect functionality but could be cleaned up
All route calculations working correctly with proper fuel tracking and cross-system jump handling
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user 'chasetest'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 verified the Route Planner feature with 3 tabs. All endpoints working: /api/routes/locations (returns 80+ locations, 3 systems, QD speeds), /api/routes/calculate (route calculation with fuel tracking and cross-system jumps), /api/routes/interdiction (snare positioning with coverage analysis), /api/routes/chase/advanced (pursuit analysis with escape destinations). Frontend tests confirmed all tabs work, star map renders correctly, and all interactive elements are functional.
